lines.text: ...Excuse me, did you drop this USB drive? It was near the river bank.

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: Oh! Yes! Thank you — my entire OS assignment was on there!
Haha, you look like you saw a ghost. Is something that important on it?

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: You literally saved my life. I don't know how to thank you...

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: I'm Mei. See you around, EECS boy.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: Heh. Bold. Maybe if you can impress the people around me first...

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: My dad's by the river — he's strict, but honest. The food stall to the north is where Niu Pai hangs out.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: And go east to Delta Building — Prof. Hung has something to test you on.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: When you're done... come find me south of Delta Building. I'll be waiting. 💕

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: ...Okay then. Bye.

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: (She walked away. I should've said something better...)

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: (But maybe I can still prove myself. I should start with her father by the river.)

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: So YOU'RE the one bothering my daughter near the river.

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: I've been sorting goods here my whole life. I can tell good character from bad.

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: Catch what's worth keeping. Throw away what isn't. Let's see if you can tell the difference.

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: ...Good instincts. You know what to keep and what to let go.

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: Head north to Xiao Chi Bu. And... don't make her cry.

lines.speaker: Mr. Wang
lines.text: You can't even tell good from bad when it's right in front of you. Come back when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Stall Owner
lines.text: Ay! Watch out — three black strays got loose in the market again!

lines.speaker: Stall Owner
lines.text: But don't worry — Niu Pai will follow you. She's... friendly.

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: Three dogs? ...I'm going to need more sausages.

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: Made it through! Niu Pai, you really helped out there.

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: Now... East to Delta Building. Prof. Hung is waiting.

lines.speaker: Prof. Hung
lines.text: Ah, you must be the one Mei mentioned. I teach dynamics here at Delta.

lines.speaker: Prof. Hung
lines.text: Love is like a pendulum — timing is everything.

lines.speaker: Prof. Hung
lines.text: Swing across these platforms. Release at precisely the right moment. Begin!

lines.speaker: Prof. Hung
lines.text: ...Perfect release. You understand that timing is everything — in physics, and in matters of the heart.

lines.speaker: Prof. Hung
lines.text: Take this fragment. Mei is waiting south of this building. Don't keep her.

lines.speaker: Prof. Hung
lines.text: The rope of fate requires precise release. Too early or too late — both result in a fall.

lines.speaker: Prof. Hung
lines.text: Come back and try again. Patience.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: You actually made it through everything. My dad, the market, even Prof. Hung...

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: I'm... genuinely impressed.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: But there's one more thing. I want to know if we're really in sync — heart to heart.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: Heh. Confident. I like it. Ready when you are. ♥

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: Just breathe. Follow the rhythm. I'll be right here.

lines.speaker: Mei
lines.text: Our hearts are already in sync. ♥

lines.speaker: EECS Boy
lines.text: (I think this is exactly where I'm supposed to be.)

slides.title: TRUE LOVE ENDING
slides.body:
You collected all Heart Fragments and proved yourself to everyone.

Mr. Wang by the river. Niu Pai at the food stall. Prof. Hung on the rooftop.

Mei turns to you with a warm smile...

"I heard everything you did. My dad approves. Even Niu Pai likes you now."

"...I like you too, EECS boy."

*She leans in and gives you a gentle kiss on the cheek.*

💗 Your heart.exe has been fully compiled.

slides.title: CONGRATULATIONS!
slides.body:
LOVE.EXE — Complete!

Thank you for playing. ♥

Group 23 | SS2026 NTHU

slides.title: FRIEND ZONE ENDING
slides.body:
You did well, but something was missing...

Mei smiles warmly and extends her hand.

"You're a really good person. Let's be friends!"

*You smile and nod, hiding your disappointment.*

...At least you have Niu Pai.

slides.title: REJECTED ENDING
slides.body:
You didn't manage to impress anyone...

Mei shakes her head gently.

"I'm sorry... I don't think this will work out."

*Maybe try a little harder next time.*

...You walk back along the river alone.

slides.title: NIU PAI ENDING 🐕 (Easter Egg!)
slides.body: You fed Niu Pai so many times at Xiao Chi Bu that you completely forgot why you came.

Niu Pai follows you everywhere now.

"Woof!" — Translation: "You complete me."

*ACHIEVEMENT UNLOCKED: Best Dog Dad*

...Who needs romance when you have unconditional love?

slides.title: EECS OVERLOAD ENDING (Easter Egg!)
slides.body:
You aced every challenge — the river catch, the market dash, the rooftop swing...

But you never once said anything romantic to Mei.

You graduate with the highest honors in EECS history.

...Still single.

> GPA: 4.0
> Girlfriend: NULL
> Happiness: undefined

*ACHIEVEMENT UNLOCKED: 4.0 GPA, 0 Dates.*

slides.title: 🌟 SECRET ENDING 🌟
slides.body:
You found the hidden bush beside the river bank.

A mysterious glowing figure steps out...

???: "You're the first player to find me. I've been waiting."

"As a reward — I'll tell you the truth about LOVE.EXE:"

"...It was all a game. But the feelings? Those were real."

✨ Congratulations, True Explorer.
